title: Emme Anderson
text: Emme Anderson is a third year statistics student at California State University, Monterey Bay.

title: Emme Anderson
text:
Education
California State University, Monterey Bay — B.S. in Statistics Aug 2023 – May 2027

title: Emme Anderson
text:

Published Research: Effects of Expanded Polystyrene on Tenebrio molitor Co-authored peer-reviewed article in Journal of Bio Environment Control (2023)

title: About
text: I am Emme, a enthusiastic statistics student who is dedicated to learning about data science in investigating the wonders of the world. I love the outdoors as I was born in Truckee, CA and would love to do research on the environment and mother nature.

title: Fish Stocked in the Great Lakes
text:
The source of the data is from the Tidy Tuesday package that has data on fish stocking in the Great Lakes found from the Great Lakes Fishery Commission 1867-2015.
The data includes variables such as the year, month, lake, species, state, and number of fish stocked.
The research questions I would like to address includes Has the number of fish stocked changed over the years and is there a seasonal difference? The second question is Which lakes get stocked the most and do the species of fish differ by each lake?

title: Fish Stocked in the Great Lakes
text:
The source of the data is from the Tidy Tuesday package that has data on fish stocking in the Great Lakes found from the Great Lakes Fishery Commission 1867-2015.
The data includes variables such as the year, month, lake, species, state, and number of fish stocked.
The research questions I would like to address includes Has the number of fish stocked changed over the years and is there a seasonal difference? The second question is Which lakes get stocked the most and do the species of fish differ by each lake?

title: Fish Stocked in the Great Lakes
text:
Data Visualization
I want my final visualizations to show the trends over time using a line plot and highlight each of the seasons using different lines. I would like another visualization to show the number of fish stocked for each lake using something like a bar chart that highlights each of the species types.

title: Fish Stocked in the Great Lakes
text:
Data Cleaning

I need to create a season variable by grouping the months into each of the 4 seasons.
I need to remove a couple of variables that I am not interested in.
I would also need to filter out the N/A values that are missing in the months variable for when I am creating seasons.
